title: Allen Nunis
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Allen}}

[[File:Allennunis.jpg|thumb|Allen Nunis self portrait.]]
'''Allen Nunis''' is an artist who has illustrated for ''[[Classic Star Wars]]'', the ''[[West End Games]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|''Roleplaying Game'']], and was penciler for the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Rebel Opposition]]'' comics.

*''[[Breakthrough in Bissillirus]]''
*''[[Changing the Balance]]''

*''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Two]]'' (''Domain of Evil'')
*''[[Classic Campaigns]]'' ('''Blades and Blasters'', ''All Our Sins Remembered'', ''Breakthrough in Bissillirus'', ''Changing the Balance'', ''Going My Way?'', ''Rebel Enslaved!'', ''Return to Bundim'' and ''Showdown'')
*[[Classic Star Wars 6|''Classic Star Wars'' 6]] (Cover Artist)
